sections.paragraph:
συνίστημι, συνιστάνω, συνιστάω [σύν, ἵστημι]

—1. ‘mention or present for approval’, commend, recommend Ro 16:1; 2 Cor 3:1; 4:2; 5:12; 6:4; 7:11; 10:12, 18; 12:11.

—2. ‘put beyond doubt’,confirm, establish Ro 3:5; 5:8; Gal 2:18.

—3. ‘be in close association’, intr. stand with, be there with Lk 9:32.

—4. ‘be in existence’, intr. exist

—a. of all things owing their existence to Christ Col 1:17.

—b. of the earth as a subsisting entity 2 Pt 3:5.
